name: ai_eval_harness
description: TypeScript eval harness for job-fit scoring models

scriptsDescription.build: Compiles the TypeScript project using the configuration specified in tsconfig.json.
scriptsDescription.typecheck: Performs type checking on the TypeScript project without emitting any output files.
scriptsDescription.golden:sample: Runs the script to generate or sample golden data from an export, using src/cli/sample-golden-from-export.ts.
scriptsDescription.golden:validate: Validates the golden jobs data in data/golden_jobs.jsonl using the script src/cli/validate-golden.ts.
scriptsDescription.golden:validate:strict: Validates the golden jobs data with stricter size constraints (min-size 80, max-size 100, strict-size enabled) using src/cli/validate-golden.ts.
scriptsDescription.promptfoo:tests: Builds Promptfoo test cases from golden jobs data and outputs them to data/promptfoo_tests.yaml using src/cli/build-promptfoo-tests.ts.
scriptsDescription.eval: Run eval on all configured models against all 103 golden jobs. Pass --model <name> to filter, --jobs <n> to set job count, --tag <name> for iteration tracking.
scriptsDescription.eval:quick: Quick 10-job eval on all configured models (balanced sampling).
scriptsDescription.eval:full: Full 103-job eval on all configured models.
scriptsDescription.eval:tagged: Runs a tagged eval iteration with config snapshotting and iteration logging.
scriptsDescription.iterations:summary: Runs the summarize-iterations script to generate a summary of iterations.
scriptsDescription.compare: Compare eval results across runs. Pass --model <name> to filter, --last <n> to limit runs shown.
scriptsDescription.golden:generate-fake: Generates fake job records using @faker-js/faker and appends them to data/golden_jobs.jsonl. Accepts --count, --seed, and --output flags.
